name: runtime-arena
description: Cross-language benchmarking system for comparing programming language implementations under identical workloads

scripts.build:web: npm run sync-defs && npm run prepare-results && npm run build --workspace=@runtime-arena/web
scripts.dev: npm run sync-defs && npm run dev --workspace=@runtime-arena/web
scripts.test: npm run build:checker && npm run test --workspaces --if-present && node scripts/count-implementation-loc.test.mjs && node scripts/test-checker.mjs
